fields.description: Total input tokens consumed across all sessions (including temporary).
fields.label: Total Input Tokens

fields.description: Total output tokens consumed across all sessions (including temporary).
fields.label: Total Output Tokens

fields.description: Total input tokens that were cache hits (charged at the lower cache rate) across all sessions.
fields.label: Total Cache Hit Tokens

fields.description: Total cost in EUR across all sessions, calculated from provider pricing and user overrides.
fields.label: Total Cost (€)

fields.description: Additive override on top of provider input cost per 1M tokens. Positive = surcharge, negative = discount, zero = use provider rate as-is.
fields.label: Input Cost Override per 1M Tokens (€)

fields.description: Additive override on top of provider output cost per 1M tokens. Positive = surcharge, negative = discount, zero = use provider rate as-is.
fields.label: Output Cost Override per 1M Tokens (€)

fields.description: Additive override on top of provider cache hit cost per 1M tokens. Positive = surcharge, negative = discount, zero = use provider rate as-is.
fields.label: Cache Hit Cost Override per 1M Tokens (€)
